notes: Estimates unavailable from inside a single agent turn. The haberlah skill was invoked by reading SKILL.md and the three most load-bearing references (evolution-assessment.md, owm-syntax.md, doctrine-and-gameplay.md). The draft was produced in a single pass without iterating against an external validator (per benchmark contract). The skill's Step 1 asks four clarifying questions; since this is an offline benchmark, those answers were inferred from the scenario brief and recorded in the output.md 'Strategic Context' table.
